ticket.title: MIGRATE AGENCY LOGO UPLOAD FROM BUNNYCDN TO S3 PRESIGNED URL FLOW

test_cases.description: Verify agency logo upload now stores S3 presigned URL instead of BunnyCDN URL.
test_cases.expected_result: brand_logo field stores an S3 URL (potb-public-assets-dev bucket) after upload.
test_cases.actual_result: Confirmed via API response that brand_logo field stores the correct S3 URL for test account ByronQA.
test_cases.comments: Confirmed via API response; brand_logo field stores S3 URL (potb-public-assets-dev bucket) for test account ByronQA.

test_cases.description: Verify presigned URL flow parameters via Network tab (upload target, headers, expiry).
test_cases.expected_result: Upload request targets the correct S3 presigned URL endpoint with valid headers and expiry.
test_cases.actual_result: Network tab confirmed correct presigned URL parameters at browser level.
test_cases.comments: Verified at browser level; no backend/AWS access available.

test_cases.description: Verify uploaded logo renders correctly across the platform after migration to S3.
test_cases.expected_result: Logo displays correctly wherever it appears across the platform (dashboard, SOA, etc.).
test_cases.actual_result: Logo rendered correctly across all checked touchpoints.

test_cases.description: Verify re-uploading/replacing a logo correctly overwrites the previous S3 URL.
test_cases.expected_result: New upload replaces the previous logo and updates the brand_logo field to the new S3 URL.
test_cases.actual_result: Re-upload correctly overwrote the previous S3 URL.

test_cases.description: Verify agencies still on legacy BunnyCDN URLs are unaffected by the migration (regression).
test_cases.expected_result: Agencies not yet migrated continue to display their BunnyCDN logo without disruption.
test_cases.actual_result: Legacy BunnyCDN agencies unaffected; logos still displayed correctly.
test_cases.comments: Related but distinct scope from ADD LEGACY CDN LOGO NOTICE BANNER ticket.
